name: seo-rescue
description: Eight SEO + monetization skills + orchestrator. Type /seo-rescue:rescue for the routing table, or call sub-skills directly: /seo-rescue:seo-audit-free (free-tier audit), /seo-rescue:post-core-update-recovery (Core Update recovery framework), /seo-rescue:seo-outreach-report (decision-maker PDF via Sistrix+DataForSEO+PSI), /seo-rescue:channel-economics-analyzer (per-channel P&L for 30+ marketplaces), /seo-rescue:competitor-deep-audit (DataForSEO keyword-gap analysis), /seo-rescue:psi-weekly-cron-baseline (automated PSI tracking), /seo-rescue:ai-search-rescue (AI Overviews + ChatGPT + Perplexity citation recovery), /seo-rescue:subscription-monetization-audit (recurring-revenue lever analysis with optional Stripe/Chargebee/Recurly CSV import).
